overview.description: The Direxion Daily TSM Bear 1X ETF (TSMZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) stock. TSMZ was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., Ltd. Sponsored ADR
